name: Walnut Carrot Cake ~
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the walnuts finely.
2. Grease 3 9-inch layer cake pans well and sprinkle each with about 2 1/2 tablespoons of flour to coat.
3. Chop the remaining walnuts a little more coarsely; set aside.
4. Re-sift the flour, baking powder, and salt together.
5. In a large bowl, combine the sugar, eggs, oil, and spices. Beat at high speed until light and well mixed.
6. Add half of the flour mixture to the bowl; stir until well blended.
7. Add milk, then the remaining flour.
8. Stir in the grated carrots and chopped walnuts.
9. Divide the batter evenly among the prepared pans.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Let the cakes stand in the pans on wire racks for 10 minutes.
12. Turn the cakes out onto racks to cool completely.
13. Frost with buttercream frosting and decorate with walnut halves.
